title: Epic: New Food Field for float plan

acceptance_criteria: The float-plan frontend allows users to optionally input a 'Food' field with a maximum of 500 characters.
The 'Food' field is displayed in the float plan summary and detail views without any special processing or transformation.
The 'Food' field is treated as a generic optional text field in all relevant API endpoints.
data_model_changes: Add a new column 'food' (optional, max 500 characters) to the float plan database table in float-plan-api.
api_contract_changes: Update float-plan-api endpoints to include the new 'food' field as an optional text parameter with a maximum length of 500 characters.
edge_cases: Ensure the database handles cases where the 'Food' field is omitted during float plan creation or updating.

contracts.description: Add 'food' as an optional text field with a max length of 500 characters to all relevant API endpoints.

child_issues.title: Implement 'Food' field in float-plan frontend
child_issues.body:
### Description
Implement the optional 'Food' field on the float-plan frontend, allowing users to input up to 500 characters. Display this field in both the summary and detail views of the float plan.

### Acceptance Criteria
- The user can input an optional 'Food' field with a maximum of 500 characters.
- The field is displayed on the float plan summary and detail views.
- No special processing or transformation is required for displaying this field.

### Relevant Registry Links
- [float-plan Repository](https://github.com/lackmannicholas/float_plan)
- Depends on [float-plan-api](https://github.com/lackmannicholas/float_plan_api)

child_issues.title: Update float-plan-api to support 'Food' field

migration_flags: Migration required: Add a new 'food' column to the float plan database table, optional with max 500 characters.
